tools.name: lookup_product_ingredients
tools.description: Use this tool when a user asks about a specific packaged food product and wants to see what's in it. Searches by product name and returns matching items with full ingredient lists, grouped by Trash Panda ratings (such as potentially harmful or questionable ingredients), including additives, added sugars, and ultra-processed components.  Do not use this tool for individual ingredient questions.  Examples: "Look up Cheerios", "What's in Doritos?"

tools.name: lookup_ingredient_details
tools.description: Use this tool when a user asks about a specific ingredient found in a food product, such as an additive, preservative, or sweetener. Returns the ingredient's name, rating, description, sources, and ingredient group classification.  Do not use this tool for full product lookups.  Examples: "What is sodium benzoate?", "Is carrageenan safe?"

tools.name: find_better_product_alternatives
tools.description: Get healthier alternative products in the same category. Use this to show 'Other Choices' for a product. Takes a Sanity category ID and returns verified products ordered by health rating (best first).
